name: insurance underwriters processing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For insurance underwriters processing 5–15 policies/month, manual review causes delayed risk assessments. We aggregate policy data and flag coverage gaps instead of manual review of policy documents.
problem_solved: Identifying coverage gaps in insurance policies

locked_fields.primary_problem: Identifying coverage gaps in insurance policies
